headline: NCLT admits insolvency plea against Legacy Textiles
text: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has admitted an insolvency petition of INR 5 crore filed against Legacy Textiles by one of its operational creditors. The bench has appointed an IRP to oversee the process.

headline: Director disqualification under Section 164
text: MCA records show that one of the directors of Legacy Textiles was disqualified under Section 164(2) of the Companies Act, 2013, for failure to file financial statements for a continuous period of three financial years.

headline: Labor dispute judgement against Legacy Textiles
text: The specialized labor court has ruled in favor of the workers union, ordering Legacy Textiles to pay pending dues and bonuses amounting to INR 1.2 crore within 60 days.
